headline: CoStar Data Highlights Shifting Office Yields And New Residential Insights
summary: CoStar Group (NasdaqGS:CSGP) reports new data showing office yield gaps between London and UK regions narrowing, suggesting changing investor interest across commercial real estate. The company highlights a recovery in Glasgow's office leasing market, with recent activity pointing to a post pandemic rebound in occupier demand. On the residential side, CoStar launches the Apartments.com RentPulse Index and reports resilient luxury home sales across its platforms. CoStar Group, trading at...
